prompt: A highly realistic, dramatic studio portrait of a man resembling Sam Altman with short wavy brown hair, blue eyes, thin eyebrows, and detailed skin texture, wearing a dark crew neck sweater. The right half consists of a solid dark blue background with large, bold, sans-serif text acting as a clipping mask. The text reads "WE WANT GPT 5.5 ASAP", stacked vertically across five lines. The letters are transparent windows revealing the right half of the man's face and torso, perfectly aligned with the left side to complete the portrait through the typography.
